description: Wave 0 - M00 Foundation: Create shared contracts (JSON Schema), event envelope, error model, common Go packages, and project scaffolding. Branch: feat/m00-foundation
steps: Create branch feat/m00-foundation from main

Create contracts/events/event-envelope-v1.schema.json with common fields: schemaVersion, eventId, correlationId, tenantId, siteId, gatewayId, deviceId, zoneId, observedAt, receivedAt, sequenceNo, source, quality
Create contracts/events/camera-event-v1.schema.json for camera occupancy events
Create contracts/events/occupancy-state-v1.schema.json with states: OCCUPIED, VACANT_PENDING, VACANT_CONFIRMED, UNKNOWN, STALE
Create contracts/events/equipment-state-v1.schema.json for equipment RUNNING/STOPPED/RESTART_REQUESTED/UNKNOWN
Create contracts/events/safety-decision-v1.schema.json for safety rule outcomes
Create contracts/events/actuation-result-v1.schema.json for output command results
Create contracts/events/cloud-event-v1.schema.json for cloud sync events
Create contracts/api/local-api-v1.schema.json with basic endpoint definitions
Create contracts/errors/error-model-v1.schema.json with standard error response format
Create services/gateway-server/go.mod with module github.com/thingswell-hjlee/safegai-iot-automation/services/gateway-server using Go 1.25 (available version)
Create services/gateway-server/cmd/safegai-edge/main.go with minimal skeleton (config load, logger, graceful shutdown, health endpoint)
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/events/envelope.go with EventEnvelope struct matching schema
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/events/types.go with OccupancyState, EquipmentState, SafetyDecision enums/constants
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/errors/errors.go with standard error types
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/events/envelope_test.go with validation tests
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/events/types_test.go with state validation tests
Update Makefile if needed to ensure Go build and test work with the new structure
Run make build to confirm compilation
Run make test to confirm unit tests pass
Run make verify-fast to confirm full fast verification passes
Commit all changes with descriptive message
acceptance_criteria: All JSON Schema files in contracts/events/ pass make check-json validation
Go module compiles with make build producing dist/safegai-edge binary
Go unit tests pass with make test
EventEnvelope struct has all required fields from schema
OccupancyState constants match exactly: OCCUPIED, VACANT_PENDING, VACANT_CONFIRMED, UNKNOWN, STALE
